title: Foxy's Electronics
description: A Minecraft Mod That Adds All Kinds Of Working Electronics
body:
**Foxy's Electronics** is an exciting Minecraft mod that introduces a plethora of advanced technological features to the game. This mod aims to enhance the gameplay experience by incorporating cutting-edge electronics and devices into the world of Minecraft. That Can Be Used For Roleplaying Purpouses!



This Mod Adds Electrical Components: Foxy's Electronics adds a variety of electrical components like Computers, Laptops, Monitors, Phones, and More.

Players can craft these components or find them in specific locations, They are the building blocks for decorative purposes. (AND MOLTEN METALS!)

Feel Free To Use This Mod In Any Modpack

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

⚠️**WARNING THIS MOD NEEDS CREATE TO WORK FROM VERSION 1.0.5!**⚠️

Link : https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create

⚠️**THIS MOD REQUIRES ANY ELECTRICITY MOD**⚠️

Reccomended : [Create Crafts & Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/createadditions), Or [Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

⚠️This Mod Is In Early Beta, More Features Will Be Added⚠️
